title: Pekoms and Bege Arrive
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on pekoms and bege arrive within the Capone Bege Takes Sanji storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Chasing after the Swirlyhat Pirates, the "Yonkou" big mom pirates dis- embark!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the hell is going on...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where is every- one in this country?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What Happened Here?! Goooo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who has the gall to do such a thing to [Zou]?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Was it the "Straw hat Pirates" ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the hell have they done?!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Mokomo Dukedom "Right belly fortress"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This fort-ress...

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Was a castle for a local Lord created by our ancestors long ago.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: "Zuneshaa" has remained unchanged this entire time.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: It continues on, carrying the history of the MINK Tribe....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Trading clothes with a foreigner ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is a sign of our friendship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This wardrobe is definitely high-end designer quality... like it belonged to someone important.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Correct, this one in particular is considered a "National Treasure."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WHATA-T?! AND YOU'RE GIVING IT TO ME?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But of course... everyone wanted you to have it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ooooohhh~ Garuchuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GARUCHULM (1)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Tristan- Chaaaan~ Garuchuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: GARUCHUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What is this splendor they call "Garuchuu"?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Perhaps a wondrous incantation of love?

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanjiii! Don't forget about us!! Garuchuu! :o

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who the fuck's talkin' to you?! I don't give a shit about men!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Ahhh~ Viva MINKSHIP!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Whoo Oahhh!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A... god- dress?! ...no....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nannini Nammii- Saaagan

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GAARU- CHUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUUU

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hining Pfgh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How's momo?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: the same as always. Being locked up alone in his room...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: tends to settle him down...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Well, we shouldn't let him be seen in his "human form"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes, agreed ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Hey, Caesar, how's that medicine coming along?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The assign-ment's been completed, of course, by my genius.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Pick up the pace! quit slacking off!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Dr. Caesar! I've come to pick up the medicine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hey, don't go tossing around misleading labels!!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: It's the "scientist" Caesar!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Damn it all...!! I'm stuck here making medicine to help people... what is wrong with this picture?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahh... bone baron, your Legion of fans are waiting outside!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: lick lick

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's hard to feel flattered when your fanbase are a bunch of dogs... A...

summary: Pekoms and Bege Arrive: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
